paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an article from PR Newswire on July 23, 2026, titled "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights". This article is the only recent news item available.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form on July 21, 2026, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing, indicating insider activity.
